summary: Finanzas Avanzadas module testing completed. Backend: 21/25 tests passed (4 failures due to rate limiting from multiple login attempts, not actual bugs). Frontend: Admin and Resident views working correctly. All core features verified: charge catalog CRUD, charge generation with duplicate prevention, payments (full/partial/overpayment with credit), balance calculation, role-based access control.

minor.issue: Login rate limit causes 401 responses when running full test suite with multiple login attempts. Not a bug, affects automated testing only.

success_rate.backend: 84% (21/25 passed - 4 failures due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend_resident: 100% - Finanzas tab visible, balance card, history displayed

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed charge catalog entries and charges during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finanzas module fully integrated. Admin: /admin/finanzas with summary cards (Total Cobrado, Total Pagado, Balance Global, Al día count, Atrasados count), charge catalog management, charge generation, payment registration. Resident: Finanzas tab in bottom nav shows balance card with status (Al Día/Atrasado/Adelantado), breakdown by charge type, and payment history. Backend uses 3 collections: charges_catalog, unit_accounts, payment_records. Balance is recalculated from source records after every charge/payment. Duplicate charges (same unit+type+period) return 409.

backend_api: GET /api/finanzas/charges - Admin sees all, resident sees own unit
POST /api/finanzas/payments - Full payment (status: paid, balance: 0, account: al_dia)
POST /api/finanzas/payments - Partial payment (status: partial, account: atrasado)
GET /api/finanzas/overview - Admin overview with summary stats
Resident cannot see other unit accounts (403)
frontend_admin: Summary shows: Total Cobrado, Total Pagado, Balance Global, Al día, Atrasados
Charge catalog section displays all charge types with amounts
Accounts table shows units with status badges (Adelantado/Atrasado/Al día)
'Tipo de Cargo' button opens catalog creation dialog
'Generar Cargo' button opens charge creation dialog
All dialogs have proper form fields and validation
frontend_resident: Bottom navigation shows 5 tabs: Emergency, Visits, Cases, Finances, Profile
Finances tab navigates to FinanzasResident component
Balance card shows current balance with status icon
Breakdown section shows charges by type (when applicable)
balance_logic: status: adelantado when balance < 0 (credit/saldo a favor)
